rootCause: The mobile media query set process form text inputs to width: 100%, but those inputs still used content-box sizing. Padding and borders were added outside the declared width, causing controls on /processes/create to extend past the form container on small screens.
resolution: Updated ProcessForm input styles to use box-sizing: border-box and max-width: 100%, then added mobile overflow regression coverage for create routes plus stricter process-form mobile assertions that verify controls stay within container bounds and avoid document-level horizontal overflow.
